purpose: Single source of truth for document routing. Agents use this registry to answer 'where do I find information about X?' instead of searching multiple indices.

consolidation_files.scope: All archived files (144 documents), general cross-reference index, historical records from 2026-03-17 onward
queries_it_answers: What was implemented in Phase N?
Where is document X archived?
What tests were run during Phase Y?
What decisions were made about component Z?
Which files are in the Archived/Y26/M03/ directory?
What is the summary of all archived work?

consolidation_files.scope: MVP specifications, design system deliverables, specifications complete for implementation phase
queries_it_answers: What is the current MVP specification?
Where are the design tokens defined?
What is the implementation roadmap?
Where do I find the style brief?

consolidation_files.scope: Production-ready deliverables, component library, technical specifications, demo data, verification and acceptance criteria
queries_it_answers: What production deliverables have been completed?
Where are the component library files?
What are the technical specifications for TeNET tools?
What is the status of the unified master plan?
Where is the pipeline tracking board?

consolidation_files.scope: Phase execution gates and state machine authority for all task completion
queries_it_answers: Is gate X.Y marked as PASSED?
What is the verification command for gate X.Y?
When was gate X.Y last verified?
What gates are blocking Phase N unlock?

consolidation_files.scope: Canonical type definitions and schema specifications to prevent duplicate types
queries_it_answers: Is type X already defined?
Where is the canonical definition of interface Y?
What fields does schema Z have?

consolidation_files.scope: Monthly (M-Q1–Q4) rolling schedule for archive index updates and maintenance
queries_it_answers: When should archive index be updated?
What M-Q phase should I run this month?
How do I verify archive completeness?

notes: This registry is the authoritative router. All other consolidation files (ARCHIVE_MASTER_DOSSIER, INDEX.md, DELIVERABLES_INDEX.md) are children. Agents should query this registry first to determine which consolidation file answers their question.
